title: Pentair (PNR) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, 2023 View Raised
text: Pentair (PNR) delivers improved performance in Q2 aided by the Industrial and Flow Technologies and Water Solutions segments that offset the impact of the weak pool business.

title: Pentair plc (PNR) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Pentair plc (PNR) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: 3 Clean Water Stocks to Diversify Your Green Portfolio
text: Wind and solar will continue to get the lion's share of the headlines as it relates to the world's clean energy transition. However, it may also be time for investors to consider investing in clean water stocks as part of a balanced clean energy portfolio.

title: Pentair plc (PNR) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Pentair plc (PNR) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.03 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.95 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.02 per share a year ago.

title: Pentair Reports Strong Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve and enjoy water, life's most essential resource, today announced second quarter 2023 sales of $1.1 billion. Sales were up 2 percent compared to sales for the same period last year. Excluding currency translation, acquisitions and divestitures, core sales declined 7 percent in the second quarter. Second quarter 2023 earnings per diluted share from continuing operations (“EPS”) were $0.93 com.

title: Pentair (PNR) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Pentair's (PNR) second-quarter 2023 performance is likely to reflect inflated costs and supply-chain issues, offset by pricing actions.

title: Pentair to Release Second Quarter 2023 Earnings and Host Investor Conference Call on July 27
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pentair plc , will report its second quarter results before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, July 27, 2023.

title: Pentair: Fairly Valued After A Strong Rally, Better EPS Growth Seen In 2024
text: UK stocks have underperformed compared to the S&P 500 in recent months, but London-based water treatment company Pentair has bucked the trend. Pentair's Q1 results beat estimates, with operating EPS of $0.91 beating consensus by $0.14 and revenue rising 3% YoY to $1.03 billion due to supply chain improvements and consumer trends. Despite a hold rating on Pentair due to potential macro-level risks, the company's forward earnings growth is robust and its valuation appears fair, with a potential for consolidation of first-half gains.
